translations.*回頭想到 Google Apps Script 本身就能部署成 Web App: *Looking back, Google Apps Script itself can be deployed as a Web App, which can respond with a GUI form during a Web doGet. After submitting the form, it triggers subsequent GitHub integration processes.*

- I `always run the script using your account identity.`

- Only me

- **All users within the same XXX organization** `Only users from the same organization who are logged in with a Google account can access.`

translations.- Warning message at the top of GAS Web:
- Warning message at the top of GAS Web App cannot be hidden by default

- GAS Web App uses an IFrame to embed our page, so achieving 100% RWD is difficult.  
  You can only adjust the window width using `.setWidth()`.
translations.- [Function as a Service cold start issu:
- [Function as a Service cold start issue](https://www.cloudflare.com/zh-tw/learning/serverless/what-is-serverless/){:target="_blank"}.  
  If a service is idle for a while, it goes to sleep, causing the next call to take longer to start (3 to ≥ 5 seconds); **Slack Apps require API responses within 3 seconds or they are considered failures**. Slack will then throw an error, and event listening will be lost, leading to repeated sends.

- **Google Apps Script doGet and doPost methods cannot access Headers.**  
  **This prevents using [official security verification](https://api.slack.com/authentication/verifying-requests-from-slack){:target="_blank"} and disables the ability to turn off [Slack Retry](https://api.slack.com/authentication/verifying-requests-from-slack){:target="_blank"}.**

- Google Apps Script single-thread limitation.  
  If connecting to other services takes more than 3 seconds to respond, Slack will immediately mark it as failed.

translations.Function as a Service 有很多種， [Cloud Funct: There are many types of Function as a Service. [Cloud Functions](https://cloud.google.com/functions?hl=zh-tw){:target="_blank"} offer more flexibility, but due to organizational IT restrictions, we cannot freely add Public Cloud Functions and there are cost concerns. Therefore, we return to our old friend — Google Apps Script.
translations.GAS Web App 上方警告提示，預設無法隱藏\n: Warning message at the top of GAS Web App cannot be hidden by default
translations.GAS Web App 是用 IFrame 把我們的頁面嵌在裡面，因此很難做到:
GAS Web App uses an IFrame to embed our page, so achieving 100% RWD is difficult.  
You can only adjust the window width using `.setWidth()`.
translations.GAS 右上角選擇「部署」-> 選擇右上角「編輯」-> 版本選擇「建立新版本」\: In GAS, click "Deploy" at the top right -> select "Edit" at the top right -> choose "Create new version" under Versions
translations.Github API 有兩種存取方式，一種是傳統的 Restful，另一種是更彈: GitHub API has two access methods: the traditional Restful and the more flexible GraphQL; this article uses Restful as an example.
translations.Github Action Workflow 表單優化與整合其他工作流程工具(J: Github Action Workflow Form Optimization and Integration with Other Workflow Tools (Jira, Asana, Slack..) to Improve Development Efficiency.
translations.Google Apps Script 單執行緒問題。\n如果要串接其他服務響應時:
Google Apps Script single-thread issue.  
If connecting to other services takes more than 3 seconds to respond, Slack will directly mark it as failed.
translations.Slack API 使用請參考 [官方文件](https://api.slack: For using the Slack API, please refer to the [official documentation](https://api.slack.com/methods/chat.postMessage){:target="_blank"}.
translations.[Function as a Service 冷啟動問題](https://ww:
[Function as a Service cold start issue](https://www.cloudflare.com/zh-tw/learning/serverless/what-is-serverless/){:target="_blank"}.  
If a service is not called for a while, it goes to sleep, and the next call takes longer to start (3 to ≥ 5 seconds); **Slack Apps have very strict API response time requirements, needing a reply within 3 seconds or it is considered a failure**. Slack will then throw an error, and event listening will be considered lost, causing repeated sends.
translations.```yaml\n# ...\non:\n workflow_dispatch:
```yaml
# ...
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      buildNumber: # Corresponds to GAS payload.inputs.xxx
        description: 'Version number'
        required: false
        type: string
      # ...More
      SLACK_USER_ID:
        description: 'Slack User Id for receiving action notification'
        type: string
      SLACK_CHANNEL_ID:
        description: 'Slack Channel Id for receiving action notification'
        type: string
      SLACK_THREAD_TS:
        description: 'Slack message ts'
        type: string
      
jobs:
  # some jobs...

  if-deploy-failed-message:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: failure()
      - name: update slack message
        uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v2.0.0
        with:
            method: chat.update
            token: ${{ secrets.SLACK_BOT_TOKEN }}
            payload: |
              channel: ${{ github.event.inputs.SLACK_CHANNEL_ID }}
              ts: ${{ github.event.inputs.SLACK_THREAD_TS }}
              text: "❌ Build task failed, please check the execution status or try again later.\n<${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}|Click here to view execution status> cc'ed <@${{ github.event.inputs.SLACK_USER_ID }}>"
```
translations.```yaml\n# CD 打包工作\n\nname: CD-Job\n\non:
```yaml
# CD Packaging Job

name: CD-Job

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      buildNumber: # Corresponds to GAS payload.inputs.xxx
        description: 'Version number'
        required: false
        type: string
      # ...More
      # Input types can be referenced from the official docs: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/writing-workflows/workflow-syntax-for-github-actions#onworkflow_dispatchinputs
      
jobs:
  some-job:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Print Inputs
        run: |
          echo "Release Build Number: ${{ github.event.inputs.buildNumber }}"    
```
translations.`processForm` 方法中處理表單回傳的內容，也可以多加上更多吃\n\n: The `processForm` method handles the form submission content, and you can also add more processing logic.
translations.一開始想說依照之前團隊的經驗使用 Slack App 做為 CI/CD GUI: At first, we thought of using a Slack App as the CI/CD GUI form service based on our team's previous experience. However, we currently don't have the resources to build the service with Kotlin+Ktor like before. So, we considered quickly trying to build it using Function as a Service instead.
translations.不同於 Jenkins 是自建服務，有完整的 Web GUI；Github Ac: Unlike Jenkins, which is a self-hosted service with a complete Web GUI, GitHub Actions does not have one. The only Web GUI form is a simple customizable form available when clicking "Run workflow" in Actions, allowing users to input external parameters to trigger the CI/CD workflow.
translations.之前團隊是有熱愛做自動化的同仁自己用 Kotlin+Ktor 搭建了一個完整的: Previously, team members who loved automation built a complete Slack App web service using Kotlin+Ktor. It integrated Slack messages, forms, commands, and more to receive and forward CD packaging requests, trigger GitHub Actions, and send the results back to Slack.
translations.之前的團隊使用 Github Action & Self-hosted Gith: The previous team built a complete CI/CD service using GitHub Actions, Self-hosted GitHub Runner, and Slack. The overall result was good. For app developers, setup and maintenance were relatively easy—just follow the official documentation to configure the YAML parameters, and the triggers run automatically. On the machine side, it was also easy to use your own machine as a runner. Since the service is maintained by GitHub, we didn’t have to worry about version upgrades, and the runner pulls tasks from GitHub, so there was no need to open external network ports.
translations.也可以再與其他工具、開發流程進行整合，例如先從 Asana, Jira 取得工單: It can also be integrated with other tools and development processes, such as retrieving tasks from Asana or Jira first, then selecting them to search branches via the GitHub API, trigger GitHub Actions, and finally notify users through Slack.
translations.其他 Asana API 使用請參考 [官方文件](https://develo: For other Asana API uses, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developers.asana.com/reference/gettasksforproject){:target="_blank"}.
translations.其他 Jira API 使用請參考 [官方文件](https://develop: For other Jira API uses, please refer to the [official documentation](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/rest/v3/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.前往 &gt; [Google Apps Script](https://scr: Go to > [Google Apps Script](https://script.google.com/home){:target="_blank"} and create a new project.
translations.前文有提到，我們希望及時通知使用者 CI/CD 執行狀況，我們可以使用使用者提供: As mentioned earlier, we want to notify users promptly about the CI/CD execution status. We can use the email provided by the user to look up their Slack User ID.
translations.另外也嘗試過 Slack 內建的自動化功能 Workflow Form，不過他無: I also tried Slack's built-in automation feature, Workflow Form, but it cannot create dynamic form content (e.g., fetching branches for users to select). The only customizable part is the subsequent data submission step.
translations.另外，我們可以用使用者的信箱透過 Slack App 去打 Slack API，: Additionally, we can use the user's email to call the Slack API via the Slack App to get the user's Slack ID, then send messages through the Slack App to notify the status of the CI/CD tasks.
translations.在 GAS 右上角選擇「部署」-> 「新增部署作業」->「網頁應用程式」：\n\: In the top right corner of GAS, select "Deploy" -> "New deployment" -> "Web app":
translations.在 GAS 左方檔案列表點「+」新增檔案，輸入檔案名稱「 `Form.html`: In the GAS file list on the left, click "+" to add a new file, enter the file name `Form.html`, and paste the GPT-generated HTML form template content.
translations.執行身份跟誰可以存取分別可以設置成：\n\n: The execution identity and who can access it can be set separately as:
translations.太久沒有寫 HTML,CSS 也懶得自己設計樣式，直接請 ChatGPT 產一個: Haven't written HTML for a long time and too lazy to design styles myself, so I just asked ChatGPT to generate a nicely styled HTML form template.
translations.如果 GAS 程式權限有變動(例如：多加存取 Google Sheet…etc): If the GAS script permissions change (e.g., adding access to Google Sheets, etc.), re-authorization is required; otherwise, after authorizing once, it will not prompt again.
translations.存取網頁程式的使用者 `會以當前登入的 Google 帳號使用者身份執行腳本。`: The user accessing the web app `will run the script as the currently signed-in Google account user.`
translations.山不轉路轉，轉念一想好像也不用糾結在一定要用 Slack 整合上，用 Slack: If the mountain doesn't turn, the road turns. On second thought, it's not necessary to be stuck on integrating with Slack. Using Slack integration is the best solution because it directly fits into the existing team collaboration tool, avoiding the need to learn new tools. However, due to resource constraints, we have to settle for other stable and easy-to-use methods.
translations.左：原始的 Github Action Workflow Form / 右： [: Left: Original Github Action Workflow Form / Right: [Final Result (GAS Web App Form)](https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbw8SuK7lLLMdY86y3jxMJyzXqa5tdxJryRnteOnNi-lK--j6CmKYXj7UuU58DiS0NSVvA/exec){:target="_blank"}
translations.應該有機會直接建置 Github Pages 來當 CI/CD Web GUI，: It might be possible to directly build a GitHub Pages site as a CI/CD Web GUI, but currently only GitHub [Enterprise](https://docs.github.com/en/enterprise-server@3.13/admin/configuration/configuring-your-enterprise/configuring-github-pages-for-your-enterprise#enabling-public-sites-for-github-pages){:target="_blank"} allows setting access permissions for GitHub Pages. Other options, even with Private Repos, will be public and lack security.
translations.我 `統一都用你的帳號身分執行腳本。`\n: I `always run the script using your account identity.`
translations.我們使用 Google Apps Script Web App 建置 CI/CD: We use Google Apps Script Web App to build a CI/CD form, directly linked to Google Workspace accounts, restricting access to users within the organization. It automatically obtains the current logged-in user's email and uses a GitHub repo shared account (or borrows a personal access token from an authorized account) to call the GitHub API to get the branch list. Upon submission, it calls the API again to trigger the GitHub Action to start the CI/CD process.
translations.我們先把剛剛的內容部署一次，查看結果。\n\n: Let's first deploy the previous content and check the results.
translations.我們新增一個 `Github.gs` 程式檔案存放 Github API 相關邏: We add a new file `Github.gs` to store GitHub API related logic.
translations.所有人 `不需要登入 Google 帳號、所有人都可以公開存取。`\n: Everyone `does not need to sign in with a Google account, and the app is publicly accessible to all.`
translations.所有已登入 Google 帳號的使用者 `已登入的 Google 帳號使用者都可: All signed-in Google account users `All signed-in Google account users can access.`
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有勉強使用 Slack 訊息、Block Kit、Form 串接完整個流程，但是: Tried to use Slack messages, Block Kit, and Forms to connect the entire process, but it was too prone to the issues mentioned above, so it was eventually abandoned.
translations.此功能已整合到實際打包工具使用，可參考最新文章案例：「 [**CI/CD 實戰指: This feature has been integrated into an actual packaging tool. You can refer to the latest article case: "[**CI/CD Practical Guide (Part 4): Using Google Apps Script Web App to Connect GitHub Actions and Build a Free and Easy Packaging Tool Platform**](../4273e57e7148/)"
translations.現在你可以在組織內分享這個連結給其他夥伴，他們可以直接使用這個網頁 GUI 執行: You can now share this link within your organization, allowing your teammates to directly use this web GUI to perform CI/CD tasks.
translations.目前團隊原本是使用 Jenkins 有基礎的 Web 可以給其他使用者登入使用、: Currently, the team uses Jenkins, which provides a basic web interface for other users to log in. Additionally, they developed an app that connects to Jenkins and wraps some parameters to make it easier for non-engineering users to operate.
translations.結論是不可行，原因是：\n\n: The conclusion is that it is not feasible, because:
translations.網頁應用程式中的網址，就是 Web App 存取網址。\n\n: The URL in the web application is the Web App access URL.
translations.總而言之，Google Apps Script 是 Google 另一個 Fun: In summary, Google Apps Script is another Function as a Service (FaaS) offered by Google, mainly featuring free usage and quick integration with Google services. However, it has several limitations, such as only supporting its own language, a maximum execution time of 6 minutes, limits on the number of executions, no multi-threading support, and more. For details, please refer to [my previous article](../f6713ba3fee3/).
translations.自動化、工作及開發流程優化缺的永遠不是技術，而是想法；只要有想法我們都能找到適合: What automation, work, and development process optimization always lack is not technology, but ideas; as long as we have ideas, we can find the right technology to realize them. Let's encourage each other!
translations.表單內容可依照需求自行調整。\n\n: The form content can be adjusted according to your needs.
translations.這一步，我們先把表單 GUI 完成，下一步再來串接 Github API 拿到: In this step, we first complete the form GUI. Next, we will connect to the GitHub API to get the PR branch list.
translations.這邊多補充一下對應到的 Github Action。\n\n: Here is some additional information related to the corresponding GitHub Action.
translations.通常會使用這個 CD 打包的使用者，不一定是 App 開發者本身、也不一定擁有這: Users who trigger this CD packaging are not necessarily the app developers themselves, nor do they always have permissions for the project. For example, QA may need to package a specific version, or PM/Backend may need to package a development version for testing. The GitHub Action Form requires project permissions to use, but users may not have project permissions or even an engineering background.
translations.選完點擊右下「部署」。\n\n: After selecting, click "Deploy" at the bottom right.
translations.選擇想要執行的身份帳號，如果有出現「這個應用程式未經 Google 驗證」則點擊: Select the account you want to use. If you see "This app isn't verified by Google," click "Advanced" -> "Go to XXX (unsafe)," then choose "Allow":
